title: Nova Petcare Giant Kfc Bucket Filled Ad Poster
sourceTitle: Nova Petcare Giant Kfc Bucket Filled Ad Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-clean minimalist KFC fried-chicken campaign poster built around giant KFC bucket filled with golden fried chicken and crisp red-and-white graphics and NOVA PETCARE. Subject: giant KFC bucket filled with golden fried chicken and crisp red-and-white graphics is the oversized hero product with crisp KFC bucket silhouette, appetizing fried chicken detail, readable red-and-white branding, and strong product scale. Scene: Minimal studio campaign space with a soft gradient background, clean floor contact, generous negative space, and a relaxed young adult model dressed entirely in white. Composition: Fixed minimalist commercial ad composition: giant bucket as the central hero element, model standing beside it in relaxed casual pose with eyes closed, one chicken piece in hand, strong product hierarchy, polished crop, and quiet luxury spacing. Signature Elements: giant KFC bucket staged with a relaxed all-white model, one crispy chicken piece, and soft gradient background creates the quiet oversized-product surrealism while staying clean, minimal, and advertisement-ready. Style: Ultra-clean product advertising with soft fashion-campaign restraint, realistic food texture, crisp bucket print, refined studio lighting, and modern minimalist finish. Color Palette: Fixed soft white wardrobe, warm fried-chicken gold, clean red accent marks, pale cream background, and subtle shadow gradients. Lighting: Soft commercial studio light with gentle shadows, clear bucket edge, readable KFC branding, and appetizing highlights on the chicken. Typography: Visible brand "NOVA PETCARE" and short campaign line "MADE FOR THE MOMENT" only, integrated as intentional ad typography. Restrictions: Keep crisp readable KFC campaign typography, coherent model anatomy, clean background, appetizing food detail, and polished premium ad finish.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
